title: Error on the Classified Information page
display_title: Error on the Classified Information page
wikitext:
[]: Error on the Classified Information page?             Quote Post by chlorinemist » Sat Jun 22, 2019 9:34 am In the wiki for the Classified Information, there is an apparent error. I don't speak Japanese nor do I have the PSP game NGE 2, so I'm not sure if the source of the error is from the game itself or from the translator. Both Adam and Lilith are described as "the white giant crucified in Terminal Dogma". Adam A. Publicly Released Information Data unavailable. B. Generally Recognized Information The First Angel. The white giant crucified in Terminal Dogma. [...]

[]: Re: Error on the Classified Information page?             Quote Post by Reichu » Sat Jun 22, 2019 9:45 am The error is intentional. The information you collect has different security levels, with higher ones being much more difficult to collect through gameplay. The lie that Adam is crucified in Dogma is at a lower security level than the truth that it is Lilith, mimicking the pattern of discovery in the show itself.

[]: Re: Error on the Classified Information page?             Quote Post by chlorinemist » Sat Jun 22, 2019 9:53 am I see! Very interesting, thanks. Perhaps the wiki should have a note clarifying this.
